description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ghcr.io/maxking/mailman-ci-runner Docker image, includes the SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template, and sets the variable SAST_DEFAULT_ANALYZERS to bandit,secrets. Define two stages, quality-assurance and test. In the quality-assurance stage add a qa job that runs `tox -e qa` and uploads gl-code-quality-report.json as a codequality artifact. In the test stage add a coverage job that runs `tox -e py312-django52-coverage`, a py313-djangolatest job (allowed to fail) that prints a message, edits pyproject.toml with `sed -E 's/django[<=>,.[:digit:]]+/django/' -i pyproject.toml`, then runs `tox -e py313-djangolatest`, a test-django42 job that runs in parallel for PYTHON_VER values 39,310,311,312 executing `tox -e "py$PYTHON_VER-django42"`, and a test-django52 job that runs in parallel for PYTHON_VER values 310,311,312,313 executing `tox -e "py$PYTHON_VER-django52"`.
